title: Roast Chicken with Citrusy Glaze
description: A simple and flavorful dish that combines the brightness of citrus with the richness of roasted chicken.

ingredients.name: chicken, whole (3-4 lbs)
ingredients.notes: Make sure to pat dry the chicken before roasting

ingredients.name: lemon juice
ingredients.notes: Use 2-3 lemons to get the desired amount

ingredients.name: garlic, minced
ingredients.notes: Use 3-4 cloves if you love garlic

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: Use kosher or sea salt for best flavor

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality oil for the best flavor

instructions: Rinse and pat dry the chicken. Season with salt and black pepper.
In a blender or food processor, combine orange juice, lemon juice, honey, ginger, and garlic. Blend until smooth.
Place the chicken in a roasting pan and brush the citrus glaze all over the chicken.
Drizzle olive oil over the chicken and rub it all over.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for 45-50 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
Baste the chicken with the pan juices every 20 minutes to keep it moist and promote even browning.
Once the chicken is cooked, let it rest for 10-15 minutes before carving and serving.
